name: Garlic Onion Cream Sauce- Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a skillet and add garlic, green onion, shallot, and dill weed.
2. Cook for 2 minutes, then add white wine and cream.
3. Reduce until thickened.
4. In another pan, sauté crabmeat in an ounce of clarified butter until hot.
5. Add the crabmeat to the cream mixture.
6. Add combined flour and melted butter.
